name: codex-jetbrains-mcp
author: nealzhi
description: HUD and hooks bridge for sharing JetBrains selection context with Codex.

scripts.check: node --check ./src/claude-jetbrains-client.mjs && node --check ./src/ide-discovery.mjs && node --check ./src/ws-transport.mjs && node --check ./src/hud.mjs && node --check ./src/selection-state.mjs && node --check ./.codex/hooks/selection-state.mjs && node --check ./.codex/hooks/user-prompt-submit-jetbrains-selection.mjs
